text: Deep reinforcement learning has been applied to algorithmic trading, portfolio optimization, and market making. The 2024 survey by Nature Communications found RL methods reduce transaction costs by 15-25% vs traditional approaches.

Credit scoring with deep learning (using alternative data like mobile phone usage, social media) has been shown to improve financial inclusion in developing economies where traditional credit histories are unavailable.
J.P. Morgan's LOXM AI executes trades using deep reinforcement learning, optimizing for market impact and execution risk across global equity markets with minimal human intervention.
